description: Product Description Cap for men and women 100% cotton 100% cotton, soft and comfortable. Pre-curved visor New elevated take on the classic baseball cap. Unisex design, suitable for women, men and teenagers, comfortable. Everyday fit 6 Panels The 6-panel baseball cap features a front center seam that makes it strong and durable. Dry-Tech The breathable 100% cotton band absorbs sweat, distributes heat well and makes it very comfortable. Unisex size The best size of the hat is "head circumference plus 1cm". Adjustment strap can be adjusted to "54-60cm". Reinforced The hats are reinforced at the front with buckram or rigid fabric, adding structure and preventing them from losing their shape when taken off.
